transitions.name: send_summary_report
transitions.description: Generate and send the summary report of sentiment analysis to the marketing team.
transitions.start_state_description: Sentiment analysis is complete and report generation is ready.
transitions.end_state_description: Report has been successfully sent to the marketing team.

process.name: send_email_report_process
process.description: Process to generate and send the sentiment summary report via email.

transitions.name: log_report_status
transitions.description: Log the status of the report generation and sending process.
transitions.end_state_description: The status of report generation has been logged.

process.name: log_report_process
process.description: Process to save the status of the report to the database.
